parameters.text: Write a short, warm email body for Root Soulutions (lovecrafteatery.com), a brand making bold, low-sodium, whole-food spice blends (Simple SZN, Smokey Cajun SZN, Garlicky SZN). Topic: Product Education — explain what makes our blends different (whole-food ingredients, no chemicals, low sodium). Include one key ingredient benefit and a CTA to shop. 200 words max. Email body only, no subject line. Plain text.

Write a warm, community-focused email body for Root Soulutions (lovecrafteatery.com) about their farmers market presence. Mention they are at local markets in the Greensboro NC area, share Collin's passion for the community, and include a CTA to check lovecrafteatery.com/markets for the schedule. 200 words max. Email body only, no subject line. Plain text.

Write a fun, practical recipe email body for Root Soulutions (lovecrafteatery.com). Feature one simple dish using Smokey Cajun SZN or Garlicky SZN blend. Include: dish name, 3-4 simple ingredients, 2-3 cooking steps using the blend as the main seasoning, and a CTA to shop at lovecrafteatery.com/shop. Casual and delicious tone. 250 words max. Email body only, no subject line. Plain text.

Write a brief exclusive deal email body for loyal Root Soulutions subscribers (subscribed 7+ days). Thank them for their continued support. Offer 15% off with code LOYAL15. Warm, grateful tone. CTA to shop at lovecrafteatery.com/shop. 150 words max. Email body only, no subject line. Plain text.

Write a first-purchase invitation email body for new Root Soulutions subscribers. Highlight: no chemicals, low sodium, whole-food spice blends. Offer 10% off with code WELCOME10. CTA to shop at lovecrafteatery.com/shop. Friendly, inviting tone. 150 words max. Email body only, no subject line. Plain text.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "workflow": "email_blast", "action": "sent", "recipient": "batch", "subject": $('Code — Segment Subscribers').first().json.dayLabel + ' email blast', "status": "ok", "details": String($('Code — Segment Subscribers').first().json.totalCount) + ' subscribers processed' } }}
